title: Fix race condition in cache metrics
description:
Location: internal/proxy/cache.go lines 35-36
Issue: hits and misses int64 fields updated without atomic operations
Fix: Use atomic.AddInt64() consistently

Current: c.hits++ (non-atomic)
Should be: atomic.AddInt64(&c.hits, 1)
close_reason: Fixed: Added sync/atomic import and changed hits/misses increments to atomic.AddInt64() and reads to atomic.LoadInt64() for thread safety

title: Refactor main.go into smaller files
description:
Location: cmd/clasp/main.go (1,686 lines)
Issue: Too large, mixing concerns (flag parsing, profile selection, subcommands)

Split into:
- cmd.go - subcommand dispatch
- flags.go - flag parsing and validation  
- profiles.go - profile management
- handlers.go - HTTP handlers initialization

This will improve maintainability and testability.
close_reason: Already completed - main.go split into flags.go, handlers.go, profiles.go

title: Implement request deduplication in cache
description:
Issue: Multiple identical concurrent requests hit upstream API multiple times

Fix: Implement request deduplication with shared result channel

Implementation:
- Add singleflight pattern (golang.org/x/sync/singleflight)
- Hash request body for dedup key
- Return same response to all concurrent identical requests
- Add metrics for dedup hits

Location: internal/proxy/cache.go

title: Add provider health dashboard endpoint
description:
Add real-time provider status endpoint at /health or /providers/health.

Features:
- Periodic health checks to each configured provider
- Circuit breaker state per provider
- Response latency metrics
- Last successful/failed request timestamps
- JSON output with provider status

Implementation:
- Add HealthChecker struct in internal/proxy/
- Background goroutine for periodic checks
- Expose metrics via existing /metrics endpoint

title: Add configuration file support (YAML/TOML)
description:
Replace 60+ environment variables with a config file approach.

Tasks:
- Add config.LoadFromFile() function
- Support CLASP_CONFIG_FILE env var to specify config path
- Create config schema validation
- Provide example config file
- Update documentation

Benefit: Cleaner deployments, version control-friendly configuration
